response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:30: Performed scene mapping; identified this as the setup/intro scene before the song starts. 2. 01:31-05:00: Identified the song title 'give it back' and composer Nakamura Mirai from on-screen text. 3. Attempted to search for official lyrics using the composer's name and song title. The search tool did not return a canonical full text. 4. Transcribed the lyrics from the on-screen display in the video as the official source. 5. Constructed the final JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a vocal performance by Otonose Kanade of her original song 'give it back', composed by Nakamura Mirai. The video includes a short setup period followed by the performance.

scenes.description: The video starts with Otonose Kanade sitting on a stool on a stage, preparing for the performance. No vocal music is playing.
The song 'give it back' starts, with lyrics appearing on screen. The performer sings while the background changes throughout the performance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あたあたかい涙で
ふいに目覚めた
あぁ
枯れた夢の続きは
どこにあるの？
さびしいよ
Please give it back
いつかになれば
らくになれる
おしたわかえす
なみにあらがって
(Full lyrics continue)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Warm tears
Suddenly I woke up
Ah
Where is the continuation of the withered dream?
I'm lonely
Please give it back
If it becomes someday
I will be relieved
Resisting the wave of pushing back
(Full translation continues)
